title: "Evident Value" Contributor
description: Recognised as a cross-squad contributor demonstrating "evident value" with transferrable skills across away teams.

title: Outstanding Contribution Recognition
description: Recognised as "the go-to person for any automation task or issue" for ensuring continuity across deliveries during critical periods.

title: Extra-Miler Award
description: Tribe-7 Award presented by VP Rajesh Vasudevan for going beyond the call of duty to deliver across multiple projects.

title: Manager Recognition
description: Received written appreciation from the delivery manager for diligence and dedication that "inspired the rest of the team."

title: Best Performer
description: For exceptional contributions to T24 UI automation and Loans (AA) frameworks.
